name: Minigun
description: The Minigun is Dahl's take on a rotary assault rifle, built around a three barrel assembly for very high fire rate. Unlike many rotary guns, it reaches top speed instantly with no spin up. It still suffers heavy accuracy bloom when firing continuously without zoom, with the reticle widening quickly and shots spreading badly. When zoomed, Dahl burst fire kicks in. With three barrels, this becomes a 9 shot burst released almost instantly, staying very accurate even across repeated bursts. It excels at precise, long range bullet volume, but burns through magazines and ammo quickly.
notes: Uses a Vladof style rotary barrel, so it only appears at green rarity or higher. World drop from any appropriate loot source.
